name: Glenn Ranch
tagline: A four-generation family ranch in the Petaluma hills — three barns, rolling Sonoma County views, and your wedding for a full four days.
seoDescription: Glenn Ranch is a family-owned wedding and event venue minutes from Petaluma, CA — three barns, rolling Sonoma County views, and four full days of access, with owners who live on-site.

sections.heading: Say your vows on a ranch four generations in the making
sections.subheading: Five minutes outside Petaluma, Glenn Ranch offers true rustic charm — three barns, rolling hills that overlook Sonoma County, and a wedding weekend that runs Thursday through Sunday, hosted by owners who live right on the land.

sections.heading: Four generations, one beautiful piece of land
body: Glenn Ranch has been in the family for over four generations — and it shows in the care. Owners Lori and Mark live on-site and are known for going completely above and beyond, ready to help with anything and everything your day requires.

What sets the ranch apart is time: you get the venue for four full days, Thursday through Sunday, so set-up and clean-up happen without a single stressed minute. Three barns — a main barn for the reception and two smaller ones for the couple — sit framed by hills that make the photographs.
highlights: Three barns: reception + two getting-ready spaces
Four-day access — no rushed set-up or clean-up

sections.heading: Picture your day on the ranch
sections.body: Glenn Ranch is on D Street Extension, minutes from Petaluma. Call (707) 762-7291 to tour the property.

items.q: How long do we have the venue?
items.a: Four full days — Thursday through Sunday — so set-up and clean-up are never rushed.
Three barns (a main reception barn plus two smaller getting-ready barns) and rolling hills overlooking Sonoma County.
Yes — Lori and Mark live on-site and are known for going above and beyond for couples.
On D Street Extension, about five minutes outside the city of Petaluma.
